summary_one_line: Resolving the find_index loop requires a structurally-valid OpenType table header (00 01 00 00, GPOS/GSUB tag, valid offsets) so a varRecord exists to iterate.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed OpenType GSUB/GPOS layout table: the 4-byte version magic 00 01 00 00 at offset 0x00, a script/feature tag (GPOS/GSUB) at 0x0c-0x0f, and consistent table/offset fields (ff 1e 21, 00 18, etc.) so that sanitize passes and varRecords.len > 0, making the loop at L3281 enter its body (true branch).
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry the literal magic 00 01 00 00 at 0x00-0x03, the ASCII tags GPOS/GSUB at 0x0c-0x0f, and a stable structured tail (ff 1e 21 ... 00 18) at 0x10-0x17 across all 10 winner samples; the cov overlay shows the loop body L3283-L3289 hit only by W and ConditionSet::evaluate runs 315 times for W versus 0 for L.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds are unstructured byte soup (e0 17 00 00..., fe ff ff ff..., repeated 3d/= runs) with no magic/tag at the fixed offsets, so sanitize rejects the table and varRecords.len stays 0; the loop never enters (T=0) and the false branch is taken.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, the only mutator value_profile lacks: cmplog intercepts the integer/tag comparisons (version equality, tag cmp) and substitutes the captured operand directly into the input at the comparison's byte offset, planting the exact magic/tag bytes that value_profile's Hamming-bucket feedback alone cannot land because the equality is all-or-nothing.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the loop-condition true branch of find_index iterating varRecords.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: for (unsigned int i = 0; i < count; i++)

evidence_trail.claim: The only decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog beating value_profile on the I2S delta.
Winner seeds carry the OpenType version magic and GPOS/GSUB tags at fixed offsets.
A winner seed shows the GSUB tag instead of GPOS, confirming the tag bytes are the discriminating structure.
The byte diff shows W is concentrated on the magic/tag bytes (00 01 00 00 at 0x00-0x03, GPOS/GSUB at 0x0c-0x0f) while L is dispersed.
Loser-blocking seeds are unstructured and lack the fixed-offset header.
ConditionSet::evaluate runs 315 times for the winner and 0 for the loser, showing only W enters the loop body and reaches the conditions.
The loop true branch is taken only by W (T=315) and never by L (T=0).
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace to the mutator stack that value_profile lacks.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only havoc plus the CMP_MAP Hamming-distance gradient feedback.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5486 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 3e57401a2eda285a` and observed an I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -, ancestor e0a5b09f80625fb6) at depth 22 of the 23-level chain; tool reports '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 22'.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where value_profile resolves the loop as often as value_profile_cmplog when the gate is an exact 4-byte equality on the OpenType magic/tag — showing CMP_MAP gradient alone suffices and I2S substitution is not the deciding factor.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte diff confirms W concentrates on the magic/tag offsets but does not directly prove cmplog substituted those exact bytes via I2S rather than havoc/token mutations landing them by luck; the single dash-row floor signal is a lower bound, not a precise count.
